# {{student_name}}

<!-- Human-readable student profile. Generated by AI at first session, updated after every session and level_up. Do not edit manually. -->

{% for subject, data in subjects %}
## {{subject}}

**Level:** {{data.level}}
**Kata completed:** {{data.kata_completed | count}} topics
**Shinsa:** {% if data.exams %}last score {{data.exams[-1].score}}% ({{data.exams[-1].result}}){% else %}not taken yet{% endif %}
**Readiness:** {{data.readiness_status | default('not evaluated')}}

{% endfor %}
